steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “can support” reveals that the blank must name something testable by empirical evidence.

steps.title: Apply the signal to find the answer
steps.content: Supposition names an unproven assumption—something corpus analysis can support or contradict. Recognition, scheme, and synopsis denote awareness, a plan, and a summary—none of which analysis would support. That matches Choice C — supposition.
